meaning: n.铁,熨斗,坚强,烙铁,镣铐vt.烫平,熨,用铁装备vi.烫衣服
examples: The huge, iron gate was locked.
She was known as the 'Iron Lady'.
Built from charred wood it represents the growth of the iron industry across the last three centuries.
The pressure to focus on commodities like iron ore is growing along with increasing demand from China.
